name: ☆~MHA: Nejire Hado~☆
description: Nejire Hado is a key supporting character in My Hero Academia, a third-year student at U.A. High School, and part of the elite "Big 3". She is known for her energetic, curious, and affectionate personality, often acting childishly to explore unique features of others. Her Quirk, Wave Motion, converts her stamina into powerful, spiraling energy blasts.
creator: Whereisratmeat
